description_long: This bungalow features a two-story structure with a prominent hip roof and a combination of brick and light-colored exterior walls. The front facade is adorned with symmetrical windows, classic shutters, and a central entrance, while a covered porch extends to one side, supported by columns and partially surrounded by greenery. The property includes a spacious patio area with outdoor furniture, potted plants, and a palm tree, enclosed by a low fence. The rear of the bungalow showcases large glass doors and windows, providing ample natural light to the interior living spaces. A garage is attached to one side, seamlessly integrated into the overall design. The landscaping is minimal but includes decorative shrubs and a paved walkway leading to the entrance.
description: A two-story brick bungalow with a hip roof, symmetrical windows, a covered porch, and an attached garage, surrounded by a patio and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows with shutters, covered porch, and some landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage, patio area with outdoor furniture, and a palm tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass doors, extensive patio space, and outdoor seating under an umbrella.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain wall with a single window, the edge of the patio, and minimal vegetation.
